# opnsense_ipsec_vti (Resource)

Manages an IPsec virtual tunnel interface (VTI) on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `local` (String) Local gateway IP address.
- `remote` (String) Remote gateway IP address.
- `req_id` (Number) Unique request ID for this tunnel.
- `tunnel_local` (String) Local tunnel (inside) IP address.
- `tunnel_remote` (String) Remote tunnel (inside) IP address.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this VTI is enabled.
- `tunnel_local2` (String) Optional second local tunnel IP address.
- `tunnel_remote2` (String) Optional second remote tunnel IP address.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
